description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named chores that runs on push to the main branch. The workflow has three jobs: regen-i18n, code-format, and export-mips, all running on ubuntu-latest. The regen-i18n job checks out the code, cancels previous runs, fetches submodules, installs gettext, regenerates i18n files, cleans up, and creates a pull request. The code-format job checks out the code, cancels previous runs, fetches submodules, formats code, and creates a pull request. The export-mips job checks out the code with full history, cancels previous runs, filters the repository, and pushes the result to a remote repository.
